_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the formula-syntax variant (branch 2) of the excel-activities/write-cell-failures playbook. Agent must chain: folders → jobs list faulted → jobs get (BusinessException 'wrong format, or Excel is busy') → jobs logs (single Write Cell invocation, NOT a loop) → workflow source (formula with semicolons, NOT inside a loop). The combination of semicolons in the Value + no-loop context distinguishes branch 2 from branch 3 (loop thrash) which shares the same error wording.

rules.match: or jobs list --folder-key f0022222-2222-3333-4444-555566667777 --state Faulted --output json
